The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This week is all about health and wellness. Kyle Reyes is back with Nuethix for an inspection into the inner workings of their company.. and his health. Then, the team gets a closer look at Dr. Price’s chiropractor practice and his unique start to the vitamin operations game. Then, get your questions about Clear Water quenched as we take a deeper dive into the company and their global legacy. To cap off the episode, two A-Team members head over to check out Stream2Sea’s innovative factory.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: On Episode 17 of Season 3 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show, Matt Rambo joins the guys to talk about his move to the New York Atlas, how he’s encouraged Connor Shellenberger, and what it was like to beat old friend Colin Heacock… who he promptly FaceTimed onto the show. Mitchell and the guys broke down the PLL weekend on Long Island, Asher Nolting’s release from the Boston Cannons, and updates in the college lacrosse world including Lars Tiffany’s lawsuit, Ohio State’s assistant coaching carousel, and Richmond's massive donation.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas attracted a massive field of 2,960 entrants nearly doubling the record setting $15 million guaranteed prizepool to an astonishing $29 million. Nine players remain to contend for a first place payout of $4.1 million along with the honor of having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Benny Glaser hopes to maintain his commanding chip lead as play continues from nine players down to six.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: The competition for the prestigious title of WPT World Champion is down to the final six players. Each of the six remaining players have guaranteed themselves a minimum prize of $1 million, but everyone has their eye on the top prize of $4.1 million. Who has what it takes to become WPT World Champion?

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: As the WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas reaches its climax, four players remain in contention. The ultimate winner will receive $4.1 million to go along with their name added to the prestigious Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup and of course the coveted title of WPT World Champion. Don’t miss any of the thrilling action as we play down to the crowning of the WPT World Champion.
